chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA. Constt. Petition No.S-72 of 2025. ________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE________ 1. For orders on M.A No.197 of 2025. (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection “A”. 3. For orders on M.A No.198 of 2025. (E/A) 4. For hearing of main case. 21-03-2025 Miss Moomal Qureshi, Advocate for the petitioner. -------- Learned counsel for the Petitioner does not press the petition on the pretext that the Petitioner will approach to the learned Ex. Officio Justice of Peace, Larkana, for the purpose. Accordingly, it stands dismissed as withdrawn along with listed applications. JUDGE
